queries.sql: SELECT cpt_pseudo, cpt_statut, pfl_nom, pfl_prenom, pfl_email, pfl_role FROM t_compte_cpt LEFT JOIN t_profil_pfl ON t_compte_cpt.cpt_id = t_profil_pfl.cpt_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN pfl_role = 'A' THEN 1 WHEN pfl_role = 'M' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, cpt_pseudo ASC;
